purpose: Move program steps between library (visible:false) and active (visible:true) on AUD-8xx forms. One POST per form, full-state replacement.

body_template.value: <stepKey1>;<stepKey2>;...  (NO trailing semi — different from Risks property convention)

semantics.full_state_replacement: Every POST replaces the entire visible-step set. To add one step, send (current_visible_keys + new_key). To remove one, send (current minus that key). Empty string = clear all.
semantics.child_substeps: For each visible parent step, include its key AND every key from its childObjectList that should also be visible. Order doesn't matter — server canonicalizes.
